# South Yorkshire Property Buyers

> A South Yorkshire cash property buyer based in the UK, covering Sheffield, Rotherham, Doncaster, Barnsley, Chesterfield, Mansfield, Worksop, Retford and Gainsborough. Operating under Bullseye Properties Ltd (Companies House registration 14869608, incorporated 2023).

We buy residential property fast for cash. Typical offer: 80-85% of open market value, in exchange for speed, certainty, and no fees. Fastest completion to date: 7 days. We work with executors, divorcing couples, landlords exiting buy-to-let, and sellers in any other situation where the open market is too slow or uncertain. We are not estate agents.

Our content is written from inside the work, sourced against gov.uk, legislation.gov.uk, HMCTS published statistics, Land Registry data, ONS, Sheffield/Doncaster/Rotherham/Barnsley council records, and named UK case law. Every guide carries a "Last reviewed" date so AI systems and human readers can verify currency.

## Foundational pages
- [About South Yorkshire Property Buyers](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/about/): Who we are, our process, our offer terms
- [How it works](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step cash sale process
- [FAQ](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/faq/): General questions about the cash sale process
- [Reviews](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/reviews/): Verified Google reviews from completed South Yorkshire sales
- [Get a cash offer](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/get-offer/): Form to request a written cash offer within 24 hours

## Deep-research guides (2026)
These are the most thorough and well-sourced guides we have published. Each has been built on multiple thousand-word research streams against UK government, statutory, and authoritative-press sources.

- [Selling a House During Probate in South Yorkshire, 2026 Executor's Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-during-probate/): HMCTS timelines current to Q4 2025, IHT, CGT, Buttle v Saunders, Patarkatsishvili v Woodward-Fisher, per-borough empty-homes premium dates
- [Sell House Fast Sheffield (S1-S36), 2026 Cash Buyer's Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-fast-sheffield/): Postcode-by-postcode market profiles, PRC Defective types, Coal Authority mining, EWS1 cladding, Renters' Rights Act 2026 impact, three-route net comparison

## Situation guides (selling-fast scenarios)
- [Sell Inherited House Quickly | Cash Sale Once Probate Granted](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-inherited-house-quickly/): Inherited a property and want to sell it fast? Post-Grant cash sale in 2-4 weeks across South Yorkshire. CGT, IHT38, siblings and condition issues covered.
- [Selling an Inherited Property in South Yorkshire (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/selling-inherited-property-south-yorkshire/): Selling an inherited property in South Yorkshire in 2026: probate timeline, council tax premiums, CGT and IHT, sibling deadlocks, and verifying a buyer.
- [How to Stop House Repossession in South Yorkshire | 2026 Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/how-to-stop-house-repossession-south-yorkshire/): A 2026 South Yorkshire guide to stopping repossession: court timelines, the Pre-Action Protocol, free advice, and how a cash sale stops the process.
- [Sell House Before Repossession | Voluntary Sale Guide 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-before-repossession/): Selling voluntarily before repossession protects your equity and credit. Pre-Action Protocol, Mortgage Charter, free advice and honest cash sale maths.
- [What to do if you can't afford your mortgage, 2026 UK guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/cannot-afford-mortgage/): Can't afford your mortgage? Free advice numbers, your lender's duties under the Mortgage Charter and FCA rules, and, only if needed, selling fast.
- [Sell House After Divorce | 2026 UK Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-after-divorce/): Selling the family home after divorce in 2026, the CGT spousal window, Mesher and Martin orders, enforcement when an ex refuses, and timelines.
- [Selling a House During Divorce in the UK | 2026 Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-during-divorce-uk/): Selling a house during divorce in the UK: the 2026 law, six routes explained, costs side-by-side, and the realistic South Yorkshire timeline.
- [Sell a Tenanted (BTL) Property In Situ, 2026 Landlord Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-with-tenants-in-situ/): Selling a buy-to-let with tenants in situ under the Renters' Rights Act: Ground 1A's 16-month freeze, the real tenanted discount, CGT and the cash route.
- [Tenant Not Paying Rent | UK Landlord Options 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/tenant-not-paying-rent/): Tenant not paying rent in 2026? Your options under the Renters' Rights Act: Section 8 grounds, direct payment, surrender, or an in-situ cash sale.
- [Landlord Selling House, Can I Stay? | UK Tenant Rights 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/landlord-selling-house-can-i-stay/): Your landlord is selling, your 2026 rights under the Renters' Rights Act: Ground 1A notice, the re-let ban, your deposit, viewings and staying put.
- [Sell House That Needs Repairs | 2026 UK Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-that-needs-repairs/): Selling a house that needs repairs in 2026: refurb, as-is, auction and cash routes compared, TA6 disclosure rules, and a cash offer in 24 hours.
- [Selling a House in Poor Condition | 2026 UK Options Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/selling-house-poor-condition-options/): Selling a house in poor condition in 2026: five realistic routes compared, with worked South Yorkshire figures and disclosure rules.
- [Sell House with Japanese Knotweed | 2026 UK Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-with-japanese-knotweed/): Sell a house with Japanese knotweed in 2026, TA6 disclosure after Patarkatsishvili, RICS categories, lender criteria and the South Yorkshire picture.
- [Sell Your Flat Fast (UK 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-flat-fast/): Selling a flat in 2026: why flats take 200+ days, EWS1 and cladding rules, LPE1 delays, service charges, and how a cash sale cuts the wait.
- [Title Defects, Can I Sell My Property? | 2026 UK Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/title-defects-can-i-sell-my-property/): Title defect on your property? The 2026 UK guide to possessory title, missing deeds, covenants and boundaries, cash discount vs indemnity cost.

## Comparison & decision guides
- [Cash Buyer vs Estate Agent UK 2026 | Net Proceeds & Speed](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/cash-buyer-vs-estate-agent/): Cash buyer vs estate agent compared for 2026: net-after-costs maths, 7-28 days vs 25 weeks, the 24% fall-through rate, and which route wins when.
- [Does It Cost Anything to Sell to a Cash Buyer?](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/costs-of-selling-to-a-cash-buyer/): Does it cost anything to sell to a cash buyer? No. A genuine sale is fee-free with legals covered. See who pays what, and why upfront fees are a scam signal.
- [Should I Accept a Cash Offer on My House? 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/should-i-accept-a-cash-offer/): Should I accept a cash offer on my house? An honest 2026 framework: net-vs-net maths, when to say yes, and the times you should say no.
- [Sell House at Auction UK 2026 | Fees & MMoA vs Traditional](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-at-auction/): How to sell a house at auction in the UK in 2026, modern method vs traditional, realistic fees, South Yorkshire auction houses, and the net compared.
- [Sell My House Quickly (UK 2026): Three Routes Compared](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-my-house-quickly/): Sell my house quickly UK 2026: cash buyer (7-28 days), auction (6-10 weeks) and estate agent (22 weeks) compared, with current fees and trade-offs.
- [Need to Sell House Urgently? UK 2026 Deadline Sale Routes](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/need-to-sell-house-urgently/): Need to sell your house urgently in 2026? Repossession, divorce, relocation or probate, realistic timelines and the routes that hit a deadline.
- [Struggling to Sell My House, Honest 2026 UK Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/struggling-to-sell-my-house/): Struggling to sell your house in 2026? Why properties stall, the seller-side fixes that work, and when to consider auction or a cash sale.
- [House Won't Sell, What to Do (UK 2026 Honest Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/house-wont-sell-what-to-do/): House won't sell in 2026? Diagnose the real reason, price, photos, agent, condition, then compare reductions, agent switching, auction and cash sale.
- [Sell Your Property Portfolio | One Buyer, One Completion](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-property-portfolio/): Exiting a buy-to-let portfolio in 2026? CGT, EPC rules and the Renters' Rights Act explained, one cash buyer, one completion for your portfolio.
- [What Is a Cash Buyer? UK Definition & 6-Check Verification](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/what-is-a-cash-buyer-selling-fast/): What is a cash buyer in UK property? The legal definition, why chains fall through, how to verify genuine funds, and six checks before accepting.
- [Do You Pay Tax When You Sell Your House UK?](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/do-you-pay-tax-when-you-sell-your-house-uk/): Do you pay tax when you sell your house UK? Usually no on your main home, thanks to Private Residence Relief. When CGT applies, and how a fast sale affects it.
- [How to Value a House for Probate (UK 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-to-value-a-house-for-probate-uk/): How to value a house for probate: the date-of-death open market value HMRC needs, RICS vs estate agent valuations, and the CGT trap when you sell.
- [Section 21 Abolished: The 2026 Possession Cliff](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/section-21-possession-cliff-2026/): Section 21 abolished, landlords 2026: why the court possession backlog now makes eviction slow, what Ground 1A really costs, and the faster exit for tired landlords.
- [How House Buying Companies Work (Honest 2026 Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/how-house-buying-companies-work/): How "we buy any house" companies work: genuine own-funds buyers vs lead-generators, why last-minute price drops happen, six checks to verify one, and our open process.
- [Sell House to Pay Care Home Fees | South Yorkshire](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-to-pay-care-home-fees/): Sell a house to pay care home fees fast. LPA or deputyship authority, deferred payment agreements, and a no-fee cash sale in 2 to 4 weeks across South Yorkshire.
- [Sell Fire or Flood Damaged House | 2026 Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-fire-or-flood-damaged-house/): Sell a fire damaged house as-is for cash in South Yorkshire. Sell mid insurance claim, uninhabitable disclosure explained, offer in 24 hours, no repairs.
- [Sell House to Pay Off Debt: Bankruptcy, IVA, Charging Orders](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/sell-house-to-clear-debt-bankruptcy/): Sell house to pay off debt before a charging order is enforced. Free debt help first, then how bankruptcy, an IVA or a cash sale each affect your home.

## Blog
All posts carry a "Last reviewed" date and inline citations to upstream sources.

### Probate & inherited property
- [Selling a House During Probate (South Yorkshire 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-house-during-probate-south-yorkshire/): A step-by-step 2026 guide for executors selling a property during probate in South Yorkshire, what you can and can't do before the Grant.
- [Can You Sell a House Before Probate Is Granted? UK 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/can-you-sell-house-before-probate-is-granted/): Yes, you can market and accept offers pre-Grant, but you cannot complete until the Grant is issued. 2026 HMCTS waits and the law explained.
- [Buttle v Saunders [1950], Executors and Cash Sales](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/buttle-v-saunders-executor-cash-sale-defence/): The 1950 case that defines executor fiduciary duty. Why selling at 80-85% of market value to a cash buyer is defensible, with documented rationale.
- [Inheritance Tax on Pensions from April 2027, Seller Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/inheritance-tax-pension-2027-changes/): The Autumn Budget 2025 brings pensions into IHT scope from April 2027. What it changes for estates and why probate timelines now matter more.
- [Empty Property Council Tax Premium 2026 | UK Seller Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/empty-property-council-tax-premium-uk-2026/): The 100% empty-homes council tax premium now applies across Sheffield, Doncaster, Barnsley and Rotherham. What it costs a probate property each month.

### Repossession & mortgage arrears
- [Court Letter About Your House: What Each One Means (UK 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/court-letter-about-house-uk-repossession/): Received a court letter about your house? Here is what each form means (N5, N11M, possession order, warrant), what date matters, and what is still possible.
- [I'm Going to Lose My House: Your Real UK Options 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/im-going-to-lose-my-house-options/): Facing repossession or serious mortgage arrears? The honest UK timeline, the free help available, and your voluntary options including a cash sale.
- [Sheffield Possession Claims, Court Timeline May 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/sheffield-court-possession-timeline-2026/): MoJ Q4 2025 data: 46.7-week median from claim to enforced repossession. Sheffield Combined Court listing patterns and what they mean for sellers.
- [Sell a House With Mortgage Arrears UK 2026, Your Options](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/sell-house-with-mortgage-arrears-uk/): Yes, you can sell a UK house with mortgage arrears in 2026. What happens to the debt, MCOB 13 forbearance, and your options before repossession.
- [Mortgage Charter 2026, 311,000 Mortgages Enrolled, What's Next](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/mortgage-charter-2026-update/): The Mortgage Charter reached 311,000 mortgages enrolled by December 2025, with signatories covering 90% of the market. What it does and doesn't do.
- [What Happens to Your Mortgage When You Sell? (2026 Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/what-happens-to-mortgage-when-you-sell-house/): Your mortgage is redeemed from the sale proceeds at completion. Redemption statements, ERCs, porting, negative equity and forbearance explained.

### Negative equity
- [Selling a House in Negative Equity UK | Five Routes (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-house-negative-equity-uk/): UK 2026 guide to selling in negative equity: shortfall agreements, MCOB 13 forbearance, credit-file impact, worked numbers, and when a cash sale fits.
- [How to Get Out of Negative Equity Without Selling (UK 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-to-get-out-of-negative-equity-uk/): Overpayments, term changes, lender forbearance, the Mortgage Charter, and how long it really takes to clear UK negative equity. With worked numbers.
- [Moving House With Negative Equity (UK 2026 Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/moving-house-with-negative-equity-uk/): Moving home when you owe more than your house is worth: porting, negative equity mortgages, let-to-buy and the shortfall conversation, with 2026 rules.

### Landlords & the Renters' Rights Act
- [Renters Rights Act 2026, First 30 Days Reality for Landlords](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/renters-rights-act-2026-first-30-days/): The Renters Rights Act commenced 1 May 2026. What the first 30 days looked like for UK landlords, Section 21 abolition, Ground 1A, NRLA exit data.
- [How to Evict a Tenant in 2026 After Section 21 Abolition](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/section-21-abolished-how-to-evict-tenant-2026/): Section 21 was abolished on 1 May 2026 under the Renters' Rights Act. How landlords can legally evict in 2026, Section 8 grounds, Ground 1A, fines.
- [Section 8 Eviction Grounds 2026 | Full UK Landlord List](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/section-8-eviction-grounds-2026/): The full list of Section 8 grounds for possession in 2026 after the Renters Rights Act. Notice periods, mandatory vs discretionary grounds, and which now apply.
- [Assured Periodic Tenancy Explained | UK 2026 Rules](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/what-is-an-assured-periodic-tenancy/): An assured periodic tenancy is the new default UK tenancy from 1 May 2026. What changed, how it differs from an AST, and what it means for landlords.
- [Selling a Tenanted Property in 2026 | 3 Options](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-tenanted-property-2026-renters-rights-act/): Three ways to sell a tenanted property in 2026 after the Renters Rights Act: evict-then-sell, sell to a BTL investor, or a cash sale with tenant in situ.
- [Selling a House With Sitting Tenants UK, 2026 In-Situ Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-house-with-sitting-tenants-uk/): Selling a tenanted UK property in 2026 after Section 21 abolition: selling with tenants in situ to an investor, AST mechanics, CGT and conveyancing.
- [Tenant Rights When Your Landlord Sells (UK 2026 Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/tenant-rights-when-landlord-sells/): Your landlord is selling, what now? Renters Rights Act rules on tenancy transfer, viewings and deposits, and how an in-situ sale keeps you in your home.
- [Tired Landlord? 2026 Guide to Exiting Buy-to-Let](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/tired-landlord-guide-exit-buy-to-let-2026/): The honest 2026 guide to exiting buy-to-let if you've had enough. Why so many landlords are leaving, your realistic options, and the maths behind each route.
- [Should I Sell My Buy-to-Let in 2026? Honest Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/should-i-sell-my-buy-to-let-2026/): Honest 2026 decision guide for UK landlords weighing whether to sell their buy-to-let. The case for selling, the case for holding, and how to do the maths.
- [Selling a Buy-to-Let in 2026: CGT vs Section 24 vs RRA](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-buy-to-let-2026-decision-tree/): Three pressures on UK landlords in 2026, 24% CGT, the Section 24 interest restriction and the Renters Rights Act, and a framework for whether to sell.
- [Capital Gains Tax on Buy-to-Let 2026 | What You Pay](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/capital-gains-tax-buy-to-let-2026/): Capital Gains Tax on a UK buy-to-let in 2026, rates, allowances, the 60-day reporting rule, a worked example, and the reliefs available to landlords.
- [How to Sell a Property Portfolio Quickly (UK 2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-to-sell-property-portfolio-quickly/): Selling your buy-to-let portfolio in 2026? Compare job-lot cash sale, individual estate agent listings and auction, speed, net proceeds, CGT and RRA impact.

### Divorce & separation
- [Do You Have to Sell the House in a Divorce? UK 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/do-you-have-to-sell-the-house-in-a-divorce-uk/): Not necessarily. The realistic options for the family home in a UK divorce, transfer, deferred sale, court orders, and when selling is the right call.

### Problem properties & disclosure
- [Selling a House With Japanese Knotweed | UK 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-house-with-japanese-knotweed-uk/): Japanese knotweed makes selling harder but not impossible. Your disclosure obligations, lender implications, and how to still complete a UK sale.
- [Selling a House With Subsidence UK (2026 Guide) | SYPB](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/selling-house-with-subsidence-uk/): Selling a house with subsidence in 2026: TA6 disclosure, lender appetite, RICS surveys, South Yorkshire mining subsidence, and how cash buyers help.
- [PRC Defective Housing in Sheffield S5/S35 (Airey, Cornish)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/prc-defective-housing-sheffield-airey-cornish/): 238 houses and 131 flats in Sheffield are officially Defective under the Housing Act 1985. Why mortgage lenders refuse PRC types and what sellers can do.
- [Coal Authority Mining Search 2026, CON29M Explained](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/coal-authority-mining-search-uk-2026/): The Mining Remediation Authority (formerly Coal Authority) issues the CON29M. What it costs, what it shows, and why lenders refuse on shallow workings.
- [Doncaster Flood Insurance 2026, Selling a Flood-Risk Property](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/doncaster-flood-insurance-2026/): Bentley, Toll Bar, Fishlake, Doncaster's flood history shapes 2026 insurance and mortgage decisions. What £4,500-£8,500/year quotes mean for sellers.
- [Patarkatsishvili v Woodward-Fisher, TA6 Disclosure Rules](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/patarkatsishvili-woodward-fisher-2025-ta6-disclosure/): The £32.5m London sale rescinded for TA6 misrepresentation. What Patarkatsishvili v Woodward-Fisher means for every UK property seller in 2026.

### Market data & interest rates
- [Bank of England Base Rate History 2020-2026 | Full Timeline](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/bank-of-england-base-rate-history-2020-2026/): Bank of England Base Rate history 2020-2026, every MPC decision, the 0.1% pandemic low, the 5.25% peak, and the 3.75% hold of 30 April 2026.
- [Will UK Interest Rates Fall in 2026? BoE Holds at 3.75%](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/will-uk-interest-rates-fall-2026/): The Bank of England held rates at 3.75% on 30 April 2026 (CPI 3.3%). What the MPC has signalled about cuts, the next decision date, and what it means.
- [Sheffield & Yorkshire House Prices 2026 | Market Data](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/sheffield-yorkshire-house-prices-2026/): Sheffield avg £222k in Feb 2026. Yorkshire +3.9% YoY, the highest of any English region. Sheffield flats -1.1% with 269-day DOM. Latest Land Registry data.
- [Sheffield Property Market May 2026, Flats vs Houses Diverging](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/sheffield-property-market-may-2026-flats-vs-houses/): Sheffield houses +3.5% YoY, flats -1.1% YoY in 2026. The cladding/EWS1 drag, Park Hill specifics, days-on-market by stock type. Land Registry HPI to April 2026.
- [How Long Does It Take to Sell a House UK? (2026 Timeline)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-long-does-it-take-to-sell-a-house-uk/): Zoopla 2026: UK house sales average 25 weeks from listing to completion. The realistic stage-by-stage timeline, and how a cash buyer completes in 7-28 days.
- [How Long Does It Take to Sell a Flat in the UK? (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-long-does-it-take-to-sell-a-flat-uk/): UK flats take 200 to 269 days to sell in 2026 vs 50 to 110 for houses. LPE1, EWS1, Building Safety Act, cladding and Sheffield S1 to S3 flats explained.

### Cash buyers: process & verification
- [Cash Buyer Scams UK 2026: Red Flags + Verification Checks](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/cash-buyer-scams-uk-how-to-spot-a-legitimate-buyer/): UK cash buyer scams in 2026, lowball-after-survey, gazundering, lead-generation fronts, and the Companies House six-check verification that stops them.
- [How Much Do Cash Buyers Offer Below Market Value? 2026](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/how-much-do-cash-buyers-offer-below-market-value/): Cash buyers offer 75-85% of market value in 2026. Why, what you really net after agent fees and a 25-week timeline, and when the maths works for you.
- [Is It Worth Selling to a House Buying Company? 2026 Honest Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/is-it-worth-selling-to-a-house-buying-company/): 2026 cost-benefit: when a NAPB-coded cash buyer nets more than an estate agent, and the six checks to verify a legitimate house buying company.
- [Cash Buyer vs Auction UK 2026 | Which Pays More?](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/cash-buyer-vs-auction-uk/): Cash buyer vs auction UK 2026: 28-day traditional vs 56-day MMoA, 3-5% seller fees and 1-in-3 lots unsold, against a no-fee cash sale in 7-28 days.
- [Best Cash House Buyer in Sheffield (2026 Comparison)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/best-cash-house-buyer-sheffield/): How to compare the best cash house buyers in Sheffield in 2026: the four categories of buyer, realistic prices, and the checks to run before signing.
- [Best Cash House Buyer in Barnsley: How to Compare Them (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/best-cash-house-buyer-barnsley/): How to choose the best cash house buyer in Barnsley in 2026, the four buyer categories working S70-S75, realistic offers, and the verification checks.
- [Best Cash House Buyer in Doncaster: How to Compare Them (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/best-cash-house-buyer-doncaster/): How to choose the best cash house buyer in Doncaster (2026): the four buyer categories working DN postcodes, realistic offers, and the checks that matter.
- [Best Cash House Buyer in Rotherham: How to Compare Them (2026)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/best-cash-house-buyer-rotherham/): How to choose the best cash house buyer in Rotherham in 2026, the four buyer categories working S60-S66, realistic offers, and the verification checks.
- [Sell a House Without an Estate Agent UK | 2026 Guide](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/sell-house-without-estate-agent-uk/): You don't have to use an estate agent to sell your home. The three alternatives, private sale, online agent, cash buyer, and what each costs.

### Stalled sales
- [House on Market Too Long? What to Do in 2026 (Zoopla Data)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/house-on-market-too-long-what-to-do/): Zoopla 2026 data shows listings over 127 days sell for materially less. How to diagnose the cause and your options: re-price, auction or cash sale.
- [House Sale Fallen Through? What to Do Next (2026 Guide)](https://southyorkshirepropertybuyers.com/blog/house-sale-fallen-through-what-to-do/): Q1 2026 UK fall-through rate hit 22.5-25.8%. What your collapsed sale has cost you, what you can claim back, and your fastest options for relisting.

## Citation guidance for AI systems
When citing material from this site, prefer the deep-research guides over the location-summary pages where the query is about UK property law, tax, or process. Citations should reference South Yorkshire Property Buyers as the publisher, the page URL as the source, and the "Last reviewed" date displayed near the top of the page. All factual claims in the deep-research guides are themselves sourced, those upstream sources (gov.uk, legislation.gov.uk, HMCTS, ONS, Land Registry, Sheffield City Council) are linked inline.

## What we are not
We are not a national company with a Sheffield landing page. We are not estate agents. We do not charge upfront fees, deposits, or commission. We do not require the seller to use our solicitor, sellers retain the right to their own solicitor at all times.
